message:
fix(search): raise Tantivy writer arena from 3MB to 15MB minimum

The writer(3_000_000) call in index_message() was below Tantivy's
minimum of 15,000,000 bytes, causing "memory arena in bytes per thread
needs to be at least 15000000" errors that made MCP send_message hang
after DB commit.

Closes #48

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
